title: Fake Heart Hardcore
description: Give your Minecraft HUD a bold new look with the Hardcore hearts
body:
❤️ Fake Heart Hardcore
Give your Minecraft HUD a bold new look with the iconic Hardcore hearts. This texture replaces the default survival heart sprites with the Hardcore-style hearts, making your health bar feel more intense, stylish, and immersive.

Perfect for players who love the Hardcore aesthetic but still want to use it in any world mode, whether it’s Survival, PvP, Adventure maps, or casual gameplay. It’s a small visual change that gives your interface a much stronger and more unique identity.

🔥 Features:

❤️ Replaces normal hearts with Hardcore hearts
🎮 Works in any world, no need to play Hardcore mode
✨ Cleaner, stronger, and more immersive HUD style
📦 Lightweight and easy to install
🧱 Keeps the original Minecraft pixel-art feel

A simple pack, but one that makes your survival experience look way more epic.
